body_preview: - `yyds deepseek cache-report` returns "no DeepSeek cache metrics found" after the Day 125 `record_cache_metrics_direct` fix. The fix works for FIM and stream-check diagnostic paths (`parse_fim_completion_response`, `parse_chat_completion_sse`) but neither function is called during normal agent chat completions. `parse_chat_completion_sse` is only invoked fr
expected_evidence: `yyds deepseek cache-report` output transitions from "no DeepSeek cache metrics found" to an honest diagnostic The existing test `cache_report_aggregates_state_events` at line 2185 still passes (it shouldn't need changes unless the error message format changes) Implementation: In `build_cache_report` (line ~1999): when the events vector is empty after filter
title: Make cache-report explain why agent chat metrics are unavailable
